{
  "fixture": "wam-beaconing",
  "description": "Captured results of WAWebWamBeaconing.maybeGetEventSequenceNumber under controlled (Math.random, WATimeUtils.unixTime, UserPrefs) stubs.",
  "snapshotRevision": 1039260921,
  "liveRuntimeRevision": 1039260921,
  "capturedAt": "2026-05-12",
  "capturedVia": "mcp__whatsapp__web_live_debug_eval_to_file",
  "sourceModule": "WAWebWamBeaconing",
  "activationThreshold": 0.01,
  "daySeconds": 86400,
  "scenarios": [
    {
      "name": "activate_then_increment_regular",
      "description": "Day0 roll under 0.01 → activates \"regular\" key; subsequent calls within same day return monotonically increasing sequence",
      "results": [
        {
          "step": "first_call_activates",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": 0.005,
          "result": 1
        },
        {
          "step": "same_day_increments_1",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": null,
          "result": 2
        },
        {
          "step": "same_day_increments_2",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": null,
          "result": 3
        },
        {
          "step": "same_day_increments_3",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": null,
          "result": 4
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "reject_then_remain_inactive",
      "description": "Day0 roll above 0.01 → \"regular\" key stored as null; further same-day calls keep returning null",
      "results": [
        {
          "step": "first_call_rejects",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": 0.5,
          "result": null
        },
        {
          "step": "same_day_still_null_1",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": null,
          "result": null
        },
        {
          "step": "same_day_still_null_2",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": null,
          "result": null
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "rerolls_at_day_boundary",
      "description": "After a UTC day passes, the state for that key re-rolls. Day0 activates, Day1 deactivates.",
      "results": [
        {
          "step": "day0_activates",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": 0.005,
          "result": 1
        },
        {
          "step": "day0_increment",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": null,
          "result": 2
        },
        {
          "step": "day1_deactivate",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8726400,
          "dayIndex": 101,
          "pushedRandom": 0.5,
          "result": null
        },
        {
          "step": "day1_still_null",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8726400,
          "dayIndex": 101,
          "pushedRandom": null,
          "result": null
        },
        {
          "step": "day2_reactivate",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8812800,
          "dayIndex": 102,
          "pushedRandom": 0.001,
          "result": 1
        },
        {
          "step": "day2_increment",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8812800,
          "dayIndex": 102,
          "pushedRandom": null,
          "result": 2
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "independent_keys",
      "description": "Different buffer keys roll independently; activation of \"regular\" does not influence \"realtime\".",
      "results": [
        {
          "step": "regular_activates",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": 0.005,
          "result": 1
        },
        {
          "step": "realtime_rejects",
          "bufferKey": "realtime",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": 0.5,
          "result": null
        },
        {
          "step": "regular_increments",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": null,
          "result": 2
        },
        {
          "step": "realtime_still_null",
          "bufferKey": "realtime",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": null,
          "result": null
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "threshold_boundary",
      "description": "The activation cutoff is 0.01 inclusive: random==0.01 activates, random==0.01000001 rejects",
      "results": [
        {
          "step": "random_eq_threshold",
          "bufferKey": "regular",
          "unixTime": 8640000,
          "dayIndex": 100,
          "pushedRandom": 0.01,
          "result": 1
        },
        {
          "step": "reset_day_for_next",
          "bufferKey": "realtime",
          "unixTime": 8726400,
          "dayIndex": 101,
          "pushedRandom": 0.01000001,
          "result": null
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
